name: Penuche Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt the butter.
2. Stir in the brown sugar and cook until bubbly.
3. Remove from heat and add the milk. Beat vigorously until smooth.
4. Gradually add the sifted powdered sugar by hand until reaching a spreading consistency.
5. Immediately frost the tops of two 8 or 9-inch cake layers, or the top of one 13 X 9-inch cake.
